title: Passage to Chult
epigraph: From the House of Healing to the jungle's edge — by oath, by storm, by ice, by augury.

title: Down the Soshenstar to the Failing Camps
epigraph: From the cooled town to the smoke over Camp Vengeance — by canoe, by lasso, by spared goblin's oath, by the mad mother's word: use fire.
